## Authoring Rules / 编写规则

- Keep the document bilingual in a **mixed** style: each paragraph or bullet should pair English and Chinese together.  
  保持**英中混合**写法：每个段落或 bullet 都要把英文和中文配对写在一起。
- Do not split the document into separate English-only and Chinese-only sections.  
  不要把文档拆成纯英文区和纯中文区。
- Prefer concise change summaries tied to actual released work.  
  优先写与实际发布内容对应的精炼变更摘要。
